summary: Enhanced infographic generation feature fully tested and verified working. All 9 requested features passed: infographic generation with AI sections, visual preview modal with card grid (not raw text), green gradient header with title, 2-column section cards with colored left borders, numbered badges, large stat values, stat labels, bullet points, export to PNG without errors, theme toggle working with infographic preview, and other output types (Slide Deck) showing raw text as expected.
passed_tests: 1. Studio page loads with all 9 tool cards visible (Audio Overview, Slide Deck, Video Script, Mind Map, Research Report, Flashcards, Quiz, Infographic, Data Table) - PASS
2. Generated Outputs section shows 14 outputs with correct Preview/Export buttons - PASS
3. Click Preview on infographic output → shows visual card grid (NOT raw text) - PASS
4. Infographic preview shows green gradient header with title - PASS
5. Infographic preview shows subtitle 'Based on X key insights from your sources' - PASS
6. Infographic preview shows gold decorative divider under subtitle - PASS
7. Infographic preview shows 2-column grid layout of section cards - PASS
8. Section cards have colored left borders (green, yellow, cyan, purple, etc.) - PASS
9. Section cards have numbered badges (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) with colored backgrounds - PASS
10. Section cards show large stat values (e.g., '18+ Modules', '4 Stages', '3 Core Apps') - PASS
11. Section cards show stat labels (e.g., 'Platform capabilities', 'Patient journey') - PASS
12. Section cards show bullet points with colored bullets matching card theme - PASS
13. Export button on infographic → downloads PNG file successfully - PASS
14. Exported PNG is valid (Format: PNG, Size: 1200x2008, Mode: RGBA, ~727KB) - PASS
15. Theme toggle works with infographic preview (both light and dark modes) - PASS
16. Dark mode: infographic preview modal renders correctly with proper contrast - PASS
17. Other output types (Slide Deck) show raw text in preview (not visual grid) - PASS
18. No console errors during infographic preview or export operations - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Canvas infographic rendering (lines 1302-1600) properly uses roundRect, drawIcon helper, and wrapText for dynamic card heights
Visual preview in modal (lines 2659-2702) correctly checks modalData.type === 'infographic' to show grid layout vs raw text
Export generates PNG using Canvas API with proper dimensions (1200px width, dynamic height based on sections)
Theme toggle CSS variables properly applied to infographic preview modal background and text colors
seed_data_creation: Used existing 14 outputs and 3 sources already in database from previous testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced infographic generation feature fully implemented and tested. Key implementation details: (1) Canvas-based PNG export at /app/frontend/src/components/NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx lines 1302-1600 with drawIcon helper for geometric shapes, wrapText for dynamic text wrapping, dynamic card height calculation, (2) Visual preview modal at lines 2659-2702 shows 2-column CSS grid with colored borders and numbered badges for infographic type only, other types show raw text in <pre> element. (3) Backend endpoint at /api/generate handles infographic type with AI-enhanced prompt returning slides_data array with sections containing title, stat, statLabel, bullets, and icon fields.
